meta.editInstructions: Add confirmed specialists as type confirmed with real name, photo, role, discipline, and hpcsa. Use type unallocated for disciplines allocated at booking. Never use stock photography.

providers.name: Yonela Tenza
providers.photoAlt: Yonela Tenza, Hospital Manager at Florida Day Hospital
providers.note: Coordinates theatre lists, nursing teams, and admissions so every patient's day proceeds with clarity and calm. Staffed in partnership with Exclusive Medical Agency.

providers.description: Cataract and eye day surgery on scheduled theatre days.
Gastroscopy, colonoscopy, and digestive investigations under sedation.
Ear, nose, and throat day procedures for adults and children.
Hernia repair, lump excision, and minor general day surgery.
Diagnostic and minor gynaecological day procedures in a discreet setting.
Image-guided pain intervention procedures as scheduled day cases.
